title: Overview
sub: SkillEval&Opt Studio — skill evaluation & training console

empty.title: No evaluations yet
empty.hint: Once you run an evaluation, each skill's pass rate and trend show up here.

empty.title: No completed training yet
empty.hint: Once training completes, the baseline → best score gain shows up here.

tokens.title: Token usage (completed jobs)
tokens.note: Scope: eval = executor agent + LLM judge; train = optimizer + rollout executor agent; older jobs with no recorded tokens are excluded.

empty.title: No jobs yet
empty.hint: Pick a skill from the library, then run an evaluation or training — jobs will appear here.
